title: wedelia pedunculosa
intro: Wedelia pedunculosa, also known as the flowering spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia pedunculosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
